plugin.name: Hadars_Plugin_Management
plugin.author: Hadar
plugin.purpose: Manage and maintain multiple scripts from github

muclient.script:
require "serialize" require "tprint" require "aard_requirements" --Use this to check for VI require "wait" local json = require("json") dofile(GetInfo(60) .. "aardwolf_colors.lua")
local gitHubRaw = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zzyzzyzzx/Hadar/master/ZZZZZZ(Repo)/github.list" local rawPluginUrl
-- Cached async module, loaded once on enable local async
-- Tracks async responses for cache building local cache_Len = 0 local cache_res = 0
-- Self-update locals local PLUGIN_VERSION local PLUGIN_NAME
--[[ TODO: add ability to add other scripts add auto update checks on login (?maybe timer based) ]]
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Helper / Utility Functions -- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Formats a plugin short name for display: underscores to spaces, uppercase local function formatName(s) return string.upper(string.gsub(s, "_", " ")) end
-- Parses and validates a number argument from HPM commands -- Returns the number, or nil and prints an error local function parseNum(PID, cmd) local num = tonumber(PID:match("(%d+)")) if not num then hadarprint("You need to supply a number, EG HPM " .. cmd .. " 1", "error") end return num end
-- Loads async once and caches it; returns it or nil on failure local function getAsync() if async then return async end local ok, a = pcall(require, "async") if not ok then hadarprint("async module unavailable", "error") return nil end async = a return async end
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Print / Display -- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function hadarprint(str, level)
if level == "debug" then if HPMVar["Debug"] == "yes" then if HPMVar["VI"] then AnsiNote(ColoursToANSI("@YHPM DEBUG@W: @w" .. str .. "@w")) else AnsiNote(ColoursToANSI("@G[@YHPM DEBUG@G]@W: @w" .. str .. "@w")) end end elseif level == "error" then if HPMVar["VI"] then AnsiNote(ColoursToANSI("@MHPM @rERROR@R: @w" .. str .. "@w")) else AnsiNote(ColoursToANSI("@R[@MHPM @rERROR@R]@W: @w" .. str .. "@w")) end elseif level == "script" then if HPMVar["VI"] then AnsiNote(ColoursToANSI("@CH@cP@CM@G: " .. str .. "@w")) else AnsiNote(ColoursToANSI("@G[@CH@cP@CM@G]@c " .. str .. "@w")) end elseif level == "helpfile" then if utfset then text = utils.tohex(str) if string.find(text, "2B") ~= nil then text = text:gsub('2B', function(x) c = pluscount .. "F" if pluscount == 5 then pluscount = 0 else pluscount = pluscount + 1 end return ascii_2_utf8[c] end) end text = string.gsub(text, ("(%x%x)"), ascii_2_utf82) AnsiNote(ColoursToANSI(utils.fromhex(text))) else AnsiNote(ColoursToANSI(str)) end elseif level == "helpfile2" then if utfset then text = utils.tohex(str) if string.find(text, "2B") ~= nil then text = text:gsub('2B', function(x) c = pluscount2 .. "F" if pluscount2 == 3 then pluscount2 = 0 else pluscount2 = pluscount2 + 1 end return ascii_2_utf82[c] end) end text = string.gsub(text, ("(%x%x)"), ascii_2_utf8) AnsiNote(ColoursToANSI(utils.fromhex(text))) else AnsiNote(ColoursToANSI(str)) end else AnsiNote(ColoursToANSI(str)) end
end
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Plugin Lifecycle -- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function OnPluginSaveState() SetVariable("HPMVar", "HPMVar = " .. serialize.save_simple(HPMVar)) SetVariable("HPMPastFirstInstall", "true") end
function OnPluginInstall() if GetVariable("enabled") == "false" then ColourNote("yellow", "", "Warning: Plugin " .. GetPluginName() .. " is currently disabled.") check(EnablePlugin(GetPluginID(), false)) return end pluginfirstrun = "yes" OnPluginEnable() end
function OnPluginEnable() HPMVar = {} HPMVar["cache"] = {} HPMVar["savedETags"] = {}
HPMVar["VI"] = (aard_req_novisuals_mode == true)
if GetVariable("HPMPastFirstInstall") == "true" then assert(loadstring(GetVariable("HPMVar") or ""))() else HPMVar["Debug"] = "no" end
-- Ensure savedETags always exists even on older saved states if not HPMVar["savedETags"] then HPMVar["savedETags"] = {} end
if HPMVar["VI"] then hadarprint("Installing " .. GetPluginName() .. " version " .. GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 19) .. " VI Enabled", "script") else hadarprint("@YInstalling @c" .. GetPluginName() .. "@Y version @c" .. GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 19) .. "@Y...", "script") end hadarprint("hpm help (to see all of hadar's plugin helpfiles), or @GHPM help@c to just see this one", "script")
makeRawUrl() buildCache() end
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Main Command -- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function pmMain(n, l, wc) local first, rest = wc[1]:match("(%w+)%s*(.*)")
if first == nil then HadarHelp() return end
if first == "check" then HPMVar["Initialized"] = "no" HPMCheck() elseif first == "selfupdate" then HPMSelfUpdate() elseif first == "install" then HPMInstall(rest) elseif first == "update" then HPMUpdate(rest) elseif first == "remove" then HPMremove(rest) elseif first == "reload" then HPMReload(rest) elseif first == "vi" then setVI() elseif first == "help" then HadarHelp() elseif first == "show" then tprint(HPMVar["cache"]) elseif first == "delcache" then HPMVar["cache"] = {} HPMVar["savedETags"] = {} OnPluginSaveState() elseif first == "debug" then if HPMVar["Debug"] == "no" then HPMVar["Debug"] = "yes" hadarprint("Debugging turned on", "debug") else hadarprint("Debugging turning off", "debug") HPMVar["Debug"] = "no" end end end
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- VI Toggle -- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function setVI() if HPMVar["VI"] == true then hadarprint("VI Set to @Roff@w", "script") HPMVar["VI"] = false else hadarprint("VI Set to @Gon@w", "script") HPMVar["VI"] = true end end
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Plugin Name Helper -- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function getName(Data, pretty) local name = string.match(Data, '%s+name="Hadars?_([%w_]+)"') if pretty and name then name = formatName(name) end return name end
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- HPM Check -- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function HPMCheck() if HPMVar["Initialized"] == "yes" then if HPMVar["VI"] then HPMCheckVI() else HPMCheckFull() end else makeRawUrl() buildCache() end end
function HPMCheckVI() hadarprint("List of maintained plugins:") hadarprint("") hadarprint("To install plugin use: hpm install <number>") hadarprint("To update plugin use: hpm update <number>") hadarprint("To remove plugin use: hpm remove <number>") hadarprint("")
for num, data in ipairs(HPMVar["cache"]) do local script_short = formatName(data["ShortName"]) local installed = IsPluginInstalled(data["PluginId"]) local needsUpdate = installed and ( tonumber(data["LocalVersion"]) < tonumber(data["GHVersion"]) or data["ETagChanged"] == true )
if installed then if needsUpdate then hadarprint(num .. ": " .. script_short .. " - Commands available: Update or Remove") else hadarprint(num .. ": " .. script_short .. " - Commands available: Reload or Remove") end else hadarprint(num .. ": " .. script_short .. " - Commands available: Install") end end end
function HPMCheckFull() hadarprint("@x086+----------@g[@x051L@cist of @x051m@caintained @x051p@clugins@g]@x086----------+@w")
for num, data in ipairs(HPMVar["cache"]) do local script_short = formatName(data["ShortName"]) local installed = IsPluginInstalled(data["PluginId"]) local ghVer = tonumber(data["GHVersion"]) local localVer = tonumber(data["LocalVersion"]) local etagChanged = data["ETagChanged"] == true
ColourTell("Cyan", "", "[" .. num .. "] ", "SkyBlue", "", script_short .. " ")
if installed then if ghVer == nil then hadarprint("Something Went Wrong: Github version not cached, please run command again", "error") if HPMVar["Debug"] == "yes" then hadarprint("GHVersion == nil at index " .. num, "debug") tprint(HPMVar["cache"]) end return elseif localVer == nil then hadarprint("Something Went Wrong: Local version not cached, please run command again", "error") if HPMVar["Debug"] == "yes" then hadarprint("LocalVersion == nil at index " .. num, "debug") tprint(HPMVar["cache"]) end return end
local versionBehind = localVer < ghVer local needsUpdate = versionBehind or etagChanged
if needsUpdate then Hyperlink("hpm update " .. num, "[Update Plugin]", "Download and Update Plugin", "DarkOrange", "black", 0, 1) Hyperlink("hpm remove " .. num, "[Remove Plugin]", "Remove plugin", "Red", "black", 0, 1) if etagChanged and not versionBehind then hadarprint(" @x208*File changed*") else hadarprint("") end else Hyperlink("hpm reload " .. num, "[Reload Plugin]", "Reload plugin", "Teal", "black", 0, 1) Hyperlink("hpm remove " .. num, "[Remove Plugin]", "Remove plugin", "Red", "black", 0, 1) hadarprint(" @x011**@GPLUGIN UP TO DATE@x011**") end else Hyperlink("hpm install " .. num, "[Install Plugin]", "Install Plugin", "DarkOrange", "black", 0, 1) hadarprint("") end end
hadarprint("@x086+------------------------------------------------+@w") end
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- HPM Update -- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function HPMUpdate(PID) local num = parseNum(PID, "update") if not num then return end
local entry = HPMVar["cache"][num] local script_short = formatName(entry["ShortName"]) local localVer = tonumber(entry["LocalVersion"]) local ghVer = tonumber(entry["GHVersion"]) local etagChanged = entry["ETagChanged"] == true
if localVer == nil or ghVer == nil then hadarprint("Something went wrong while caching, please run HPM check again", "error") if HPMVar["Debug"] == "yes" then hadarprint("hpm update nil version at index " .. num, "debug") tprint(HPMVar["cache"]) end return end
if not (localVer < ghVer) and not etagChanged then hadarprint("Plugin: " .. script_short .. " already up to date. Use HPM reload " .. num .. " to reload.", "error") return end
hadarprint("Updating Plugin @G" .. script_short .. "@w", "script")
UnloadPlugin(entry["PluginId"])
local a = getAsync() if a then local req = a.request(entry["url"], "HTTPS") local retval, page, status, headers = req:join()
if status == 200 then local lscript = io.open(entry["LongName"], "w") lscript:write(page) lscript:close() -- Update stored ETag to the freshly downloaded version so the -- next check has the correct baseline and won't re-flag this plugin local newETag = headers and (headers["ETag"] or headers["etag"]) if newETag then HPMVar["savedETags"][entry["url"]] = newETag entry["ETagChanged"] = false hadarprint("ETag updated after download: " .. newETag, "debug") end -- Force save so the new ETag baseline survives a crash or reload OnPluginSaveState() else hadarprint("Update failed: HTTP status " .. tostring(status), "error") return end end
hadarprint("Plugin @G" .. script_short .. "@c Updated. Enjoy!", "script") LoadPlugin(entry["LongName"]) end
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- HPM Install -- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function HPMInstall(PID) local num = parseNum(PID, "install") if not num then return end
local entry = HPMVar["cache"][num] local script_short = formatName(entry["ShortName"]) local script_directory = GetInfo(60) local script_install = script_directory .. entry["RawName"] .. ".xml"
if IsPluginInstalled(entry["PluginId"]) then hadarprint("Plugin: @G" .. script_short .. "@w already installed. Use HPM reload " .. num .. " to reload.", "error") return end
hadarprint("Installing Plugin " .. script_short, "script")
local a = getAsync() if a then local req = a.request(entry["url"], "HTTPS") local retval, page, status, headers = req:join()
if status == 200 then local lscript = io.open(script_install, "w") lscript:write(page) lscript:close() -- Store ETag baseline on fresh install local newETag = headers and (headers["ETag"] or headers["etag"]) if newETag then HPMVar["savedETags"][entry["url"]] = newETag entry["ETagChanged"] = false hadarprint("ETag stored after install: " .. newETag, "debug") end -- Force save so the ETag baseline is persisted immediately OnPluginSaveState() else hadarprint("Install failed: HTTP status " .. tostring(status), "error") return end end
hadarprint("Plugin " .. script_short .. " Installed. Enjoy!", "script") LoadPlugin(entry["LongName"]) end
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- HPM Reload -- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function HPMReload(PID) local num = parseNum(PID, "reload") if not num then return end
local entry = HPMVar["cache"][num] local script_short = formatName(entry["ShortName"])
if IsPluginInstalled(entry["PluginId"]) then hadarprint("Currently reloading script: " .. script_short .. " please stand by", "script") ReloadPlugin(entry["PluginId"]) else hadarprint("Plugin: " .. script_short .. " not installed. Use HPM install " .. num, "error") end end
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- HPM Remove -- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function HPMremove(PID) local num = parseNum(PID, "remove") if not num then return end
local entry = HPMVar["cache"][num] local script_short = formatName(entry["ShortName"])
if IsPluginInstalled(entry["PluginId"]) then hadarprint("Currently removing script: " .. script_short .. " please stand by", "script") UnloadPlugin(entry["PluginId"]) local ok, err = os.remove(entry["LongName"]) if ok then hadarprint("Removed script: " .. script_short, "script") else hadarprint("Was not able to remove " .. script_short .. ": " .. tostring(err), "error") end else hadarprint("Plugin: " .. script_short .. " not installed. Use HPM install " .. num, "error") end end
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- URL Fetching / Cache Building -- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function string.explode(str, seperator, plain) assert(type(seperator) == "string" and seperator ~= "", "Invalid seperator (need string of length >= 1)") local t, nexti = {}, 1 local pos = 1 while true do local st, sp = str:find(seperator, pos, plain) if not st then break end if pos ~= st then t[nexti] = str:sub(pos, st - 1) nexti = nexti + 1 end pos = sp + 1 end t[nexti] = str:sub(pos) return t end
function tablelength(T) local count = 0 for i, v in pairs(T) do if v ~= "" then count = count + 1 end end return count end
function makeRawUrl() local a = getAsync() if a then local req = a.request(gitHubRaw, "HTTPS") local retval, page, status = req:join() if status == 200 then -- Strip \r to handle Windows line endings before splitting rawPluginUrl = string.explode(page:gsub("\r", ""), "\n") else hadarprint("Failed to fetch plugin list: HTTP " .. tostring(status), "error") end end return rawPluginUrl end
function buildCache() if not HPMVar["savedETags"] then HPMVar["savedETags"] = {} end
cache_Len = tablelength(rawPluginUrl) cache_res = 0 HPMVar["cache"] = {} HPMVar["Initialized"] = "no" hadarprint("BuildCache(): fetching " .. cache_Len .. " plugins", "debug")
local a = getAsync() if a then for i, url in ipairs(rawPluginUrl) do url = url:gsub("%s+$", "") if url ~= "" then a.doAsyncRemoteRequest(url, raw_get_cache, "HTTPS") end end else hadarprint("Something went wrong with async in building cache", "error") end end
-- Fetch raw plugin XML, parse metadata, and compare ETag for change detection. -- ETag is returned as a response header from raw.githubusercontent.com and -- changes whenever the file content changes â no second request needed. function raw_get_cache(retval, page, status, headers, full_status, request_url) cache_res = cache_res + 1 hadarprint("raw_get_cache(): response " .. cache_res .. "/" .. cache_Len, "debug")
if status ~= 200 then hadarprint("Cannot connect to GitHub (status: " .. tostring(status) .. ")", "error") checkCacheComplete() return end
local WName = getName(page, false) local rawname = string.match(page, '%s+name="([a-zA-Z0-9_]+)"') local ghVersion = string.match(page, '%s%s+version="(%d+%.?%d+)"') local pid = string.match(page, '%s+id="(%w+)"') local lVersion = GetPluginInfo(pid, 19) or 0 local lname = GetPluginInfo(pid, 6) or GetInfo(60) .. rawname .. ".xml"
hadarprint("Parsed: name=" .. tostring(WName) .. " ver=" .. tostring(ghVersion) .. " pid=" .. tostring(pid), "debug")
-- Pull ETag from response headers; try both cases since servers vary local etag = headers and (headers["ETag"] or headers["etag"]) hadarprint("ETag received: " .. tostring(etag), "debug")
local etagChanged = false if etag then local storedETag = HPMVar["savedETags"][request_url] hadarprint("ETag stored: " .. tostring(storedETag), "debug")
if storedETag == nil then -- First time seeing this plugin; store ETag as baseline, no update needed HPMVar["savedETags"][request_url] = etag etagChanged = false hadarprint("ETag stored for first time for: " .. request_url, "debug") elseif storedETag ~= etag then -- File has changed â keep the OLD ETag in savedETags so repeated -- hpm checks keep flagging this until the user runs hpm update etagChanged = true hadarprint("ETag CHANGED for: " .. request_url, "debug") else etagChanged = false hadarprint("ETag unchanged for: " .. request_url, "debug") end else hadarprint("No ETag in response headers for: " .. request_url, "debug") end
HPMVar["cache"][cache_res] = { ShortName = WName, RawName = rawname, GHVersion = ghVersion, PluginId = pid, LocalVersion = lVersion, LongName = lname, url = request_url, ETag = etag, ETagChanged = etagChanged, }
checkCacheComplete() end
-- Called after every response; fires HPMCheck once all plugins are done. -- Also force-saves state so ETags survive crashes or unexpected reloads. function checkCacheComplete() if cache_res >= cache_Len then hadarprint("Cache build complete (" .. cache_res .. "/" .. cache_Len .. ")", "debug") HPMVar["Initialized"] = "yes" -- Force save immediately so ETag baselines are persisted right away -- rather than waiting for MushClient to call OnPluginSaveState OnPluginSaveState() if pluginfirstrun == "yes" then pluginfirstrun = "no" else HPMCheck() end end end
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Self Update -- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Self updating code originally from crowley: -- https://github.com/AardCrowley/Aardwolf-Scripts
function HPMSelfUpdate() local raw = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zzyzzyzzx/Hadar/master/PluginManager/Hadar_Plugin_Manager.xml" PLUGIN_VERSION = GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 19) PLUGIN_NAME = GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 1) local a = getAsync() if a then a.doAsyncRemoteRequest(raw, Raw_Update, "HTTPS") else hadarprint("Error on updating", "error") end end
function Raw_Update(retval, page, status, headers, full_status, request_url) if status ~= 200 then hadarprint("Self-update fetch failed: HTTP " .. tostring(status), "error") return end
local raw_version = tonumber(string.match(page, '%s%s+version="(%d+%.?%d+)"'))
if tonumber(raw_version) == tonumber(PLUGIN_VERSION) then hadarprint("@G" .. PLUGIN_NAME .. "@c is up to date!", "script") elseif tonumber(raw_version) > tonumber(PLUGIN_VERSION) then hadarprint("Updating from version @R" .. PLUGIN_VERSION .. "@c to @R" .. raw_version .. "@c. Please stand by.", "script") local file = io.open(GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 6), "w") file:write(page) file:close() if "" == GetAlphaOption("script_prefix") then SetAlphaOption("script_prefix", "\\\\\\") end Execute(GetAlphaOption("script_prefix") .. "DoAfterSpecial(1, \"ReloadPlugin('" .. GetPluginID() .. "')\", sendto.script)") HPMVar["cache"] = {} HPMVar["savedETags"] = {} hadarprint("Update complete. Have a muddish day!", "script") elseif tonumber(raw_version) < tonumber(PLUGIN_VERSION) then hadarprint("Your development is too quick!", "error") end end
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Help File -- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function HadarHelp() if HPMVar["VI"] then hadarprint("Plugin Manager Version:" .. GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 19)) hadarprint("") hadarprint("hpm help: Displays this helpfile") hadarprint("hpm check: Checks to see if there are any updates") hadarprint("hpm update <number>: update the plugin with the given number") hadarprint("hpm reload <number>: reload the plugin with the given number") hadarprint("hpm install <number>: installs plugin with the given number") hadarprint("hpm remove <number>: removes plugin with the given number") hadarprint("hpm selfupdate: checks to see if any updates for this plugin") hadarprint("hpm VI: toggles VI features on or off") hadarprint("") hadarprint("only plugin that will have this link, and only if you want to support my efforts!") hadarprint("https://www.paypal.com/donate?hosted_button_id=Q93B59ZGWHETA") else hadarprint("@x086+-----------------------@g[@CP@clugin @CM@canager @WV:" .. GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 19) .. "@g]@x086------------------------+", "helpfile") hadarprint("@x086| @x214hpm help @x110- @x214Displays this helpfile @x086 |", "helpfile") hadarprint("@x086| @x208hpm check @x110- @x208Checks to see if there is any updates @x086 |", "helpfile") hadarprint("@x086| @x214hpm selfupdate @x110- @x214Checks for updates on this script@x086 |", "helpfile") hadarprint("@x086| @x208hpm update <number> @x110- @x208updates plugin with number from hpm check@x086 |", "helpfile") hadarprint("@x086| @x214hpm reload <number> @x110- @x214reloads plugin with number from hpm check@x086 |", "helpfile") hadarprint("@x086| @x208hpm install <number> @x110- @x208installs plugin with number from hpm check@x086 |", "helpfile") hadarprint("@x086| @x214hpm remove <number> @x110- @x214removes plugin with number from hpm check@x086 |", "helpfile") hadarprint("@x086| @x208hpm vi @x110- @x208Toggles VI mode for plugin @x086 |", "helpfile") hadarprint("@x086| @WONLY PLUGIN THAT WILL ASK @x086|", "helpfile") hadarprint("@x086| @x208https://www.paypal.com/donate?hosted_button_id=Q93B59ZGWHETA @x086|", "helpfile") hadarprint("@x086+----------------------------------------------------------------------+", "helpfile") end end
